positive: A seamless, minimalist illustration of a whimsical, glowing constellation arching over a silhouette of a gentle forest grove and a stylized mountain range. The aesthetic is celestial geometry mixed with nature, using deep indigo, neon teal, and gold ink accents against an off-white background. The stars are geometric points of light and nebulae are soft, ethereal clouds. Composition is centered and highly contrasted, perfect for a repeating print or large chest graphic. Clean lines, vector art style, high detail, perfect symmetry, forest spirit, cosmic journey, abstract.
negative: blur, low quality, grainy, watermark, signature, text, logo, extra limbs, malformed hands, poor anatomy, dirty, noisy, artifacts, harsh edges, photographic, realism
